name: Virginia Pound Cake with Glaze
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Merrill. This is an heirloom recipe--not sure exactly how old.
1. Beat butter and margarine until fluffy.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat slowly for 5 minutes.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each egg.
4. Gradually beat in cake flour and add flavorings and blend.
5. Bake in preheated 300 degree oven for 1 hour.
Glaze:
1. Melt butter, stir in sugar and add the lemon juice.
2. Bring to a boil then immediately pour over the warm cake.
3. Punch holes in the cake with an icepick if you prefer, before pouring on the glaze.
